modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Missing pen tips for the SmartBoard in the classroom.

full_description_text: The user reported that the pen tips for the SmartBoard are absent. This issue was noted during a session in the smart classroom. The absence of pen tips is affecting the functionality of the SmartBoard. Further assistance may be required to resolve this matter.
short_description: Missing pen tips for the SmartBoard in the classroom.
description: The user reported that the pen tips for the SmartBoard are absent. This issue was noted during a session in the smart classroom. The absence of pen tips is affecting the functionality of the SmartBoard. Further assistance may be required to resolve this matter.
